description_long: This lamppost features a robust, cylindrical central pole with a textured base that flares outward for stability. At the top, a horizontal arm extends on both sides, each supporting a square lantern-style light fixture suspended by short, decorative brackets. The lanterns have a classic, almost East Asian-inspired design, with visible frame details and frosted panels. The central pole and arm appear to be made of metal with a wood-like finish, giving the structure a blend of traditional and industrial aesthetics. The base is reinforced with cross-bracing, suggesting durability and resistance to tipping. No signage or additional attachments are visible, and the overall design is both functional and visually appealing for urban or park environments.
description: A sturdy lamppost with a cylindrical pole, flared base, and two suspended square lanterns in a classic, decorative style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central pole and one lantern visible from the side, with the base and top details prominent.
description_view_1: Side view displaying both lanterns hanging symmetrically from the horizontal arm, highlighting the full width of the lamppost.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the central pole and one lantern visible, mirroring the front's structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing both lanterns and the horizontal arm, emphasizing the symmetrical design.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Square lantern-style fixtures with frosted panels and visible frame details, reminiscent of East Asian design.
